commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Node planner for release Docker E2E and live-model matrices, wires the reusable live/E2E workflow to consume generated matrices with zero-count guards, and adds focused planner/wiring coverage.

PR surface: Tests +81, Config -56, Other +250. Total +275 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a CI workflow optimization PR, not a bug report. Current-main source shows the existing full matrices and step-level profile guards that the PR moves earlier into planning.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated repair is needed; maintainers should review the release-automation risk and CI results before merging.

target.title: ci: filter release workflow matrices
target.body:
## Summary

- add a release workflow matrix planner for profile-gated Docker E2E chunks and Docker live model provider shards
- wire `openclaw-live-and-e2e-checks-reusable.yml` to use generated matrices with empty-plan guards
- add focused planner/workflow wiring coverage for beta, stable, and focused live-suite selection

Related issue search: no exact open issue/PR found. Local gitcrawl surfaced #59727 as a broad CI matrix refactor, but this PR is the narrower skip-only job reduction.

## Verification

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `node scripts/check-workflows.mjs`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/plan-release-workflow-matrix.mjs test/scripts/release-workflow-matrix-plan.test.ts`
- Node assertion probe for beta/stable planner output and workflow wiring
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: release workflow matrix entries that were guaranteed to skip due to `release_test_profile` are filtered before matrix expansion for Docker E2E chunks and Docker live model provider shards.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw Codex worktree on macOS with Node 24 and repo workflow/parser tooling.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `INCLUDE_RELEASE_PATH_SUITES=true INCLUDE_LIVE_SUITES=true RELEASE_TEST_PROFILE=beta node scripts/plan-release-workflow-matrix.mjs` and the verification commands listed above.

Evidence after fix: beta planning now emits 3 Docker E2E chunk jobs instead of 14 and 1 Docker live model provider job instead of 9, with omitted-lane reasons in the planner output.

Observed result after fix: workflow syntax sanity and focused planner assertions passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: live GitHub Actions dispatch was not run; the new Vitest file was attempted locally but did not complete promptly under current machine load, so the equivalent Node assertion probe was used for scoped proof.
target.author: romneyda
